message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox

participant Main
participant creatFile
participant createJava
participant createCSS

Main -> creatFile : 1 call function
Main --> createJava : 2 callfunction
Main --> createCSS : 3 callfunction

creatFile --> Main : 4 new file created
createCSS --> Main : 5 new file created
createJava --> Main : 6 new file created

@enduml
